name: Morphous Owl
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible focused research system to be coded from the Owl light and dark design-system boards: warm taupe surfaces, amber-eye focus, charcoal text, feather-brown depth, and old-forest neutrals. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for focused research UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for dense reading, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Measured 8px grids, facial-disc framing, feather-line dividers, document panels, and quiet research dashboards.
